heading: Define a Data Store for a Federated Database Instance
body:
To configure a data store for a federated database instance, you need to
create a storage configuration JSON file that defines your data stores and
maps them to collections you can query. MongoDB provides
federated database instance support for the following data stores:

- [Configure Atlas Data Federation to query data from S3](adf-configuration-file-aws)

- [Azure data stores](adf-configuration-file-azure)

- [Google Cloud Storage Bucket](adf-configuration-file-gcp)

- [Atlas cluster](adf-configuration-file-atlas)

- [HTTP URL](adf-configuration-file-http)

- [Online Archives](adf-configuration-file-oa)

> **Important:** Information in your storage configuration is visible internally at
> MongoDB and stored as operational data to monitor and improve the
> performance of Atlas Data Federation. We recommend that you don't use PII
> (Personally Identifiable Information) in your configurations.
